testcase.name: test_ai_status_returns_enabled_status
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_endpoints.py:55: in test_ai_status_returns_enabled_status assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_minutes_draft_generates_formal_minutes
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_endpoints.py:120: in test_minutes_draft_generates_formal_minutes assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}. Response: {response.text[:500]}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401. Response: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_minutes_draft_validation

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 422 for invalid payload, got 401 assert 401 == 422 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_endpoints.py:164: in test_minutes_draft_validation assert response.status_code == 422, f"Expected 422 for invalid payload, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 422 for invalid payload, got 401 E assert 401 == 422 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_governance_suggestions_returns_actionable_suggestions
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_endpoints.py:190: in test_governance_suggestions_returns_actionable_suggestions assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}. Response: {response.text[:500]}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401. Response: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_minutes_draft_with_minimal_input
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_endpoints.py:300: in test_minutes_draft_with_minimal_input assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
